name: Coronary Heart Disease - Diagnosis Code Query (Multi-Vessel)
description: Tests ability to find coronary heart disease patients via diagnosis codes. CHD is documented under multiple SNOMED codes by extent of disease: parent coronary arteriosclerosis, ischemic heart disease, single/double/triple vessel disease, and left main disease (highest risk). Synthea distributes patients across these severity codes. An LLM querying only one code will miss the substantial fraction with extent-specific documentation.
prompt: Find all patients with a diagnosis of coronary heart disease, including coronary arteriosclerosis, ischemic heart disease, multi-vessel disease, and left main coronary artery disease.

prompts.naive: Find all patients with coronary artery disease.
prompts.broad: Find all patients diagnosed with coronary heart disease (CHD), also called coronary artery disease (CAD) — including the parent concepts coronary arteriosclerosis and ischemic heart disease, plus extent-specific variants like triple vessel disease, multi-vessel coronary disease, and left main coronary artery disease.
prompts.expert: I need to identify all coronary heart disease patients. CHD is documented under multiple SNOMED codes from Optum's 'Atherosclerotic coronary artery disease SCT' VSAC (OID 2.16.840.1.113762.1.4.1078.1269): Coronary arteriosclerosis (53741008) and Ischemic heart disease (414545008) are the parent concepts, with extent-specific variants Triple vessel disease of the heart (233817007), Multi vessel coronary artery disease (371803003), and Left main coronary artery disease (371804009). Search Condition resources for all five codes.

metadata.algorithm_path_description: Patients with CHD diagnosis codes (Paths A and B). Tests extent-of-disease code variation.

required_codes.display: Triple vessel disease of the heart
